concepts.label: Violet
concepts.definition: A small flowering plant with purple or blue blooms

concepts.label: Orchid
concepts.definition: An exotic flowering plant with complex blooms

concepts.label: Carnation
concepts.definition: A flowering plant with ruffled petals

concepts.label: Iris
concepts.definition: A flowering plant with sword-like leaves and colorful blooms

concepts.label: Daffodil
concepts.definition: A spring flowering plant with yellow trumpet-shaped blooms

concepts.label: Spinach
concepts.definition: A leafy green vegetable high in iron

concepts.label: Broccoli
concepts.definition: A green vegetable with tree-like florets

concepts.label: Cabbage
concepts.definition: A leafy vegetable with tightly packed leaves

concepts.label: Cucumber
concepts.definition: A long green vegetable with high water content

concepts.label: Pepper
concepts.definition: A colorful vegetable that can be sweet or hot

concepts.label: Corn
concepts.definition: A cereal grain with kernels on a cob

concepts.label: Peas
concepts.definition: Small round green seeds eaten as a vegetable

concepts.label: Beans
concepts.definition: Edible seeds that grow in pods

concepts.label: Radish
concepts.definition: A small root vegetable with a spicy flavor

concepts.label: Beet
concepts.definition: A root vegetable with a sweet earthy flavor

concepts.label: Orange
concepts.definition: A citrus fruit with orange-colored skin and sweet juice

concepts.label: Grape
concepts.definition: Small round fruits that grow in clusters

concepts.label: Strawberry
concepts.definition: A red berry with seeds on its surface

concepts.label: Blueberry
concepts.definition: A small blue berry rich in antioxidants

concepts.label: Pear
concepts.definition: A sweet fruit with a distinctive shape

concepts.label: Peach
concepts.definition: A fuzzy fruit with sweet orange flesh

concepts.label: Plum
concepts.definition: A smooth-skinned fruit with sweet flesh

concepts.label: Cherry
concepts.definition: A small red fruit with a pit

concepts.label: Watermelon
concepts.definition: A large fruit with green skin and red flesh

concepts.label: Pineapple
concepts.definition: A tropical fruit with spiky skin and sweet yellow flesh

concepts.label: Wheat
concepts.definition: A cereal grain used to make flour and bread

concepts.label: Barley
concepts.definition: A cereal grain used in brewing and food

concepts.label: Oats
concepts.definition: A cereal grain commonly eaten as oatmeal

concepts.label: Rye
concepts.definition: A cereal grain used to make dark bread

concepts.label: Quinoa
concepts.definition: A grain-like seed that is high in protein

concepts.label: Millet
concepts.definition: A small grain used as food and bird feed

concepts.label: Buckwheat
concepts.definition: A plant whose seeds are used like grain

concepts.label: Sorghum
concepts.definition: A drought-resistant grain crop

concepts.label: Amaranth
concepts.definition: A plant with edible leaves and grain-like seeds

concepts.label: Chia
concepts.definition: Small seeds that are high in omega-3 fatty acids

concepts.label: Wood
concepts.definition: Hard fibrous material from trees used in construction

concepts.label: Metal
concepts.definition: A solid material that is typically hard and shiny

concepts.label: Plastic
concepts.definition: A synthetic material that can be molded into various shapes

concepts.label: Glass
concepts.definition: A transparent material made by heating sand

concepts.label: Concrete
concepts.definition: A building material made from cement, water, and aggregates

concepts.label: Steel
concepts.definition: An alloy of iron and carbon that is very strong

concepts.label: Aluminum
concepts.definition: A lightweight metal that resists corrosion

concepts.label: Copper
concepts.definition: A reddish-brown metal that conducts electricity well

concepts.label: Brass
concepts.definition: An alloy of copper and zinc

concepts.label: Bronze
concepts.definition: An alloy of copper and tin

concepts.label: Rubber
concepts.definition: An elastic material made from latex or synthetic polymers

concepts.label: Ceramic
concepts.definition: A hard material made by heating clay or other materials

concepts.label: Paper
concepts.definition: A thin material made from wood pulp used for writing

concepts.label: Cardboard
concepts.definition: A thick paper-based material used for packaging

concepts.label: Fabric
concepts.definition: Material made by weaving or knitting fibers

concepts.label: Stone
concepts.definition: Hard solid mineral matter from the earth

concepts.label: Marble
concepts.definition: A hard stone used in sculpture and construction

concepts.label: Granite
concepts.definition: A very hard rock used in construction

concepts.label: Limestone
concepts.definition: A sedimentary rock used in construction

concepts.label: Brick
concepts.definition: A rectangular block made from fired clay

concepts.label: Vehicle
concepts.definition: A means of transportation for people or goods

concepts.label: Furniture
concepts.definition: Movable objects designed to support human activities

concepts.label: Appliance
concepts.definition: A device designed to perform specific household tasks

concepts.label: Tool
concepts.definition: An implement used to carry out particular functions

concepts.label: Food
concepts.definition: Any substance consumed to provide nutritional support

concepts.label: Clothing
concepts.definition: Items worn on the body for protection and fashion

concepts.label: Building
concepts.definition: A structure with walls and roof for human use

concepts.label: Animal
concepts.definition: A living organism that feeds on organic matter

concepts.label: Plant
concepts.definition: A living organism that typically grows in soil

concepts.label: Material
concepts.definition: The substance from which something is made
